title: Ceruloplasmin Test: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
high levels of ceruloplasmin don't always mean you have a condition that needs medical treatment. Pregnancy , birth control pills , and certain medicines, including estrogen therapy to treat menopause , may cause high blood ceruloplasmin. Too much copper in your diet rarely causes high ceruloplasmin.
If you have questions about your results, talk with your provider.
Learn more about laboratory tests, reference ranges, and understanding results .
